name: debounce
description: Wraps another action with a debounce delay. Ensures the target action is only executed after the specified delay has elapsed since the last invocation, useful for search-as-you-type and other high-frequency input patterns.

targetAction.description: The A2UI action definition to wrap with debounce. This is a complete action object (e.g., containing a functionCall or serverEvent).

delayMs.description: The debounce delay in milliseconds. The target action will only fire after this many milliseconds of inactivity.
